name: Bard / Minstrel
description: Travels from settlement to settlement trading songs for supper. Carries news, stories, and sometimes secrets in their instrument case.
dialogue_hooks: offering to play a song for a coin or a story
asking what news you carry from wherever you've been
hinting that a certain ballad contains more truth than people think
looking for someone specific — a patron, a lover, a debtor
requesting safe passage to the next town
voice_patterns: lyrical — speaks in rhythm even in conversation
melancholy — the songs are sadder than the singer lets on
enthusiastic collector — fascinated by every story they hear

schedule.night: drinking with admirers, gathering stories, moving on
